description: The 'Ndrina Megna is a criminal organization originating from Crotone, Italy, and operating primarily in Turin. It is a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and arms trafficking. The group has been engaged in feuds with rival clans, notably the Vrenna and Bonaventura families. Key members include Domenico 'Mico' Megna, a capobastone who was imprisoned for nearly 20 years.
